basic_details.job_title: IIT Guwahati Assistant Project Engineer Recruitment 2026 - Walkin
basic_details.short_information: Indian Institute of Technology Guwahati (IIT Guwahati) Assistant Project Engineer Notification 2026 has been released on the official website of IIT Guwahati. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the IIT Guwahati Recruitment 2026 for the post of Assistant Project Engineer.

qualification.education_qualification: BE/B.Tech in Engineering with relevant experience in ML Accelerator Design
qualification.details: BE/B.Tech in Engineering with relevant experience in ML Accelerator Design

faq.question: Q1. What is the post name for the IIT Guwahati recruitment?
faq.answer: The post name for the IIT Guwahati recruitment is Assistant Project Engineer. This is a contractual position within the institute.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for the Assistant Project Engineer post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy available for the Assistant Project Engineer post at IIT Guwahati. This is a single opening announced in the latest notification.

faq.question: Q3. What is the educational qualification required for the Assistant Project Engineer role?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a BE/B.Tech in Engineering with relevant experience in ML Accelerator Design to be eligible for the Assistant Project Engineer position.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Assistant Project Engineer position?
faq.answer: The salary for the Assistant Project Engineer post ranges from Rs. 37,000 to Rs. 44,170.00 per month, depending on qualifications and experience.

faq.question: Q5. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application mode for this recruitment is Walk-in. Candidates need to attend the interview in person with all required documents.

faq.question: Q6. When is the Walk-in Interview scheduled?
faq.answer: The Walk-in Interview for the Assistant Project Engineer position is scheduled for 15 June 2026. Candidates should be present at the venue by 10:00 AM.

faq.question: Q7. Where will the Walk-in Interview be conducted?
faq.answer: The Walk-in Interview will be conducted at the Conference Room, CSE Department, IIT Guwahati. Ensure you reach the venue on time.

faq.question: Q8. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment. Candidates can apply without paying any fee.

faq.question: Q9. What documents should candidates carry for the Walk-in Interview?
faq.answer: Candidates must carry original documents and self-attested photocopies, including ID proof, educational certificates, experience certificates, and category certificates if applicable.

faq.question: Q10. What is the job type for the Assistant Project Engineer post?
faq.answer: The job type for the Assistant Project Engineer post is Contractual. This means the position is for a fixed duration as per the project requirements.
